IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (10840430.pdf)
SUMMARY: Motivated IT and cybersecurity professional with strong managerial, technical, and communication skills. Experienced in INFOSEC/NETOPS, project management, and budget systems. Seeking a challenging position to leverage multifaceted experience.
SKILLS: INFOSEC/NETOPS techniques, project management, budget systems, security management, cost analysis, DoD regulations, SCADA systems operations, cyber warfare, technical leadership, system development and integration, problem resolution
